PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?airport ?airportLabel ?community ?communityLabel WHERE {
  ?airport wdt:P31 wd:Q5738566 ; wdt:P1350 ?runwayLength .
  ?runwayLength wikibase:quantityAmount ?lengthValue ; wikibase:quantityUnit wd:Q26225 .
  FILTER(?lengthValue = 4992)
  .
  ?airport wdt:P131 ?community .
  ?community wdt:P131 wd:Q553 .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
